"You Dream It, We Build It"

About Us

Parsimont is a technical venture partner specializing in building high-performance, low-overhead technological infrastructure for high-growth businesses. We build custom solutions that are simple, scalable, and efficient – ensuring your technology works today and grows with you tomorrow.

As a venture partner, we replace traditional development fees with long-term incentive alignment through equity or revenue-sharing, allowing partner companies to focus on the business while we manage the technical risk.

Cloud Architecture • Systems Integration • Payments
